race.comment: SUPER VALENTINE (3) didn't make an impact in town at the latest when getting too far back. Will appreciate the drop in grade and his prior form in this grade reads favourably. Draws well for Milnes and is better over this sort of trip. Bold showing anticipated. GALLOPING GURU (5) also struck the winning blow last time when sent forward in a change of tactics and finding enough to hold them all at bay. Kept fresh for this and can keep the momentum going. ZAIN PRINCE (7) couldn't go on with the job in the straight after leading them up but this is easier and he's drawn to advantage. Expect him to give another sight. STAR CASINO (9) comes through a hot race and will appreciate the rise in trip second-up.. Is another one of the contenders,
